assistant_6vp.name: Assistant: 6 VP Flat
assistant_6vp.body: This assistant grants 6 VP at the end of the game (flat bonus, no condition).
assistant_6vp.details: Simply place on a workshop card. Scores 6 VP during endgame scoring regardless of other conditions.

assistant_apostle_panel.name: Assistant: Apostles on Panel
assistant_apostle_panel.body: Score 1 VP for each apostle placed on your apostle panel at the end of the game, up to a maximum of 10 VP.
assistant_apostle_panel.summary: 1 VP per apostle on panel (max 10 VP)
assistant_apostle_panel.details: Counts all apostles placed on your personal board's apostle panel.

assistant_mastery_level_4.name: Assistant: Mastery at Level IV
assistant_mastery_level_4.body: Score 4 VP for each mastery disc at Level IV on any mastery track at the end of the game.
assistant_mastery_level_4.summary: 4 VP per mastery disc at Level IV
assistant_mastery_level_4.details: Check all three mastery tracks. Each disc at position IV scores 4 VP.

assistant_apostle_columns.name: Assistant: Completed Apostle Columns
assistant_apostle_columns.body: Score 5 VP for each completed apostle column in your apostle panel at the end of the game.
assistant_apostle_columns.details: Each full column of apostles on your personal board scores 5 VP.

assistant_month_dials.name: Assistant: Month Dials with Workers
assistant_month_dials.body: Score 3 VP for each month dial with one of your workers on top at the end of the game.
assistant_month_dials.summary: 3 VP per month dial with your worker
assistant_month_dials.details: Only counts month dials (not zodiac) that have your workers placed on them.

assistant_zodiac_dials.name: Assistant: Zodiac Dials with Workers
assistant_zodiac_dials.body: Score 3 VP for each zodiac dial with one of your workers on top at the end of the game.
assistant_zodiac_dials.summary: 3 VP per zodiac dial with your worker
assistant_zodiac_dials.details: Only counts zodiac dials (not month) that have your workers placed on them.

sculptor_action_1.name: Sculptor Action: Vanity (Gold & Coins)
sculptor_action_1.body: Level 1: Force deviation: take 1 gold + 1 coin. Level 2: Force deviation: take 1 gold + 2 coins. Level 3: Correct deviation: take 1 gold + 3 coins.
sculptor_action_1.details: The Vanity statue. Higher sculptor levels (determined by pink mastery track) grant more coins and switch from forcing to correcting deviation.

sculptor_action_2.name: Sculptor Action: Greed (Workshop)
sculptor_action_2.body: Level 1: Force deviation: expand workshop. Level 2: Force deviation: take 1 resource of choice + expand workshop. Level 3: Correct deviation: take 1 gold + expand workshop.
sculptor_action_2.summary: Expand workshop (with resources at higher levels)
sculptor_action_2.details: The Greed statue. At all levels, lets you expand your workshop. Higher levels add free resources.

sculptor_action_3.name: Sculptor Action: Lust (Painter/Moon)
sculptor_action_3.body: Level 1: Force deviation: move painter; OR activate moon without forcing deviation. Level 2: Force deviation: take 1 coin + move painter; OR take 1 coin + activate moon with +1 modifier. Level 3: Correct deviation: take 1 coin + move painter; OR take 1 coin + activate moon with +2 modifier.
sculptor_action_3.details: The Lust statue. Choose between painter movement or moon activation. Higher levels add coins and moon modifiers.

sculptor_action_4.name: Sculptor Action: Death (Construct)
sculptor_action_4.body: Level 1: Force 2 deviations: construct. Level 2: Force 1 deviation: take 1 resource of choice + construct. Level 3: Correct 1 deviation: take 1 gold + construct.
sculptor_action_4.details: The Death statue (rings the bell). Allows construction action. Level 1 is expensive (2 deviations), improving at higher levels.

scroll_recover_workers.name: Scroll: Recover Two Workers
scroll_recover_workers.body: Flip this scroll to recover two workers from the clock or calendar.

scroll_upgrade.name: Scroll: Perform an Upgrade
scroll_upgrade.body: Flip this scroll to perform an upgrade on a production track or hammer track.

scroll_moon.name: Scroll: Activate the Moon
scroll_moon.body: Flip this scroll to activate the moon following the standard rules.

scroll_painter.name: Scroll: Move the Painter
scroll_painter.body: Flip this scroll to move the painter following the standard rules.

scroll_apostle.name: Scroll: Take an Apostle
scroll_apostle.body: Flip this scroll to take one apostle in the usual way from the walk of the apostles.

scroll_construct.name: Scroll: Perform a Construction
scroll_construct.body: Flip this scroll to perform a construction following the standard rules.

scroll_mastery_choice.name: Scroll: Mastery Advance (Choice)
scroll_mastery_choice.body: Flip this scroll to move one mastery disc of your choice up one space.

scroll_coin_mastery.name: Scroll: Coin + Mastery
scroll_coin_mastery.body: Flip this scroll to take one coin and move your disc up one space in a mastery track of your choice.

scroll_apostle_moon.name: Scroll: Take Apostle + Activate Moon
scroll_apostle_moon.body: Flip this scroll to take one apostle in the usual way AND activate the moon following the standard rules.

royal_scroll_scrolls.name: Royal Scroll: Scroll Collection
royal_scroll_scrolls.body: Immediately score 3 VP for each scroll or royal scroll (used or unused) in your play area, up to a maximum of 10 VP.

royal_scroll_month_dials.name: Royal Scroll: Month Dials
royal_scroll_month_dials.body: Immediately score 3 VP for each month dial constructed with a worker of yours on top, up to a maximum of 10 VP.
royal_scroll_month_dials.summary: 3 VP per month dial with worker (max 10 VP)

royal_scroll_zodiac_dials.name: Royal Scroll: Zodiac Dials
royal_scroll_zodiac_dials.body: Immediately score 3 VP for each zodiac dial constructed with a worker of yours on top, up to a maximum of 10 VP.
royal_scroll_zodiac_dials.summary: 3 VP per zodiac dial with worker (max 10 VP)

royal_scroll_upgrades.name: Royal Scroll: Upgrades
royal_scroll_upgrades.body: Immediately score 3 VP for each upgrade in your hammer track and production tracks, up to a maximum of 10 VP.

royal_scroll_workshops.name: Royal Scroll: Workshop Cards
royal_scroll_workshops.body: Immediately score 3 VP for each workshop card in your play area, up to a maximum of 10 VP.

royal_scroll_apostles.name: Royal Scroll: Apostles on Panel
royal_scroll_apostles.body: Immediately score 2 VP for each apostle placed on your apostle panel, up to a maximum of 10 VP.
royal_scroll_apostles.summary: 2 VP per apostle on panel (max 10 VP)

hammer_level_2.name: Hammer Bonus: Level II
hammer_level_2.body: Each hammer card grants a unique ability applied as the final step of construction. No hammer has an ability at Level I. Level II abilities vary by card and include: mastery advances, coins, resources, rooster disc movement, gold, and VP.
hammer_level_2.details: Specific abilities vary per hammer card: Move mastery disc up 1 space (choice); Take 1 coin; Move rooster disc up 1 on personal board + take 1 gold + 1 VP if already at top.

hammer_level_3.name: Hammer Bonus: Level III
hammer_level_3.body: Level III hammer abilities are enhanced versions of Level II. They include: mastery advances + coin, mastery advances + additional VP, rooster advances + gold + VP.
hammer_level_3.summary: Enhanced construction bonus at Level III
hammer_level_3.details: Specific abilities vary per hammer card: Move mastery disc up 1 + take 1 coin; Move mastery disc up 1 + take 1 coin + gain 2 VP; Move rooster disc up 1 on personal board + take 1 gold + 1 VP if already at top.

assistant_placement_rooster.name: Workshop: Placing Assistant Reward
assistant_placement_rooster.body: When you place an assistant on a workshop card, move your rooster disc up one position on your personal board. Take 1 gold and 1 VP if your rooster disc is already on the last position of the track.
assistant_placement_rooster.details: This reward triggers every time you place any assistant on any of your workshop cards.
